understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' in each level, avoiding spike tiles that end the run. Complete levels within the 2 attempts and limited turns (50 per attempt).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player moves left or right with MOVE_LEFT / MOVE_RIGHT. Gravity is always down: after any action, if there is no solid tile below, the player falls vertically until landing. Clicking on clickable tiles removes them from the grid; this can open paths or cause the player to fall if they were standing on the tile or if it was blocking a fall. Touching a spike tile ends the current attempt. Undo reverts the last action to allow backtracking from mistakes. The game is turn-based, with each action consuming a step.
